steps.title: Find the passage's direct explanation
steps.content: The passage states: "Due to Hawaiʻi's uniquely varied geographic and ecological conditions, the kiwikiu became highly specialized as it adapted to survive in a specific island habitat." That sentence answers the question directly — adaptation to a specific habitat is the stated reason.

steps.title: Eliminate each wrong choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — It lives exclusively in the most geographically isolated locations on the Hawaiian archipelago.: The passage never says the kiwikiu lives in the most isolated locations — isolation is not mentioned as the cause. ✗
  • Choice B — It adapted over time to live in a specific habitat found on the Hawaiian archipelago.: Matches the passage's exact explanation: adaptation to a specific island habitat. ✓
  • Choice C — It adapted over time to share a habitat with other highly specialized bird species on the Hawaiian archipelago.: The passage never mentions cohabitation with other specialized species. ✗
  • Choice D — It lives in a habitat that is exposed to numerous environmental stressors.: Environmental stressors are a consequence of specialization, not the cause of it. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
